description:
Calculate the area and perimeter of a property boundary in TopoCal using the survey data file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\foothills_parcel_survey.csv. The boundary is defined by five monuments (Points 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5 coded 'BM'). Create a closed polygon connecting these points in sequence (1-2-3-4-5-1) to determine the enclosed area and perimeter. Save the results to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\parcel_area_report.txt using the format:
Area: [value] m2
Perimeter: [value] m

metadata.data_source: Realistic UTM Zone 13N simulated field survey
